advancement.fairplay.root.title: Fair Minecraft
advancement.fairplay.root.description: Only what you build yourself truly belongs to you.
advancement.fairplay.fremdes_eigentum.de: You cannot break blocks you did not place yourself.
advancement.fairplay.eigene_haende.title: Your Own Hands
advancement.fairplay.eigene_haende.descr: What you build is yours. And yours alone.
advancement.fairplay.stein_ohne_ende.des: Lava + water = infinite cobblestone. And it is yours.
advancement.fairplay.sammler.title: Collector
advancement.fairplay.sammler.description: The first item lands in your hands.
advancement.fairplay.grundstein.title: Foundation
advancement.fairplay.grundstein.descript: Your first block. Something great begins here.
advancement.fairplay.koch.title: Chef
advancement.fairplay.koch.description: With fire and patience you process your resources.
advancement.fairplay.eisen_ohne_ende.des: An iron golem has fallen and left iron behind.
advancement.fairplay.leere_haende.title: Empty Hands
advancement.fairplay.leere_haende.descri: The chest was empty. Nothing to steal here.
advancement.fairplay.selbst_ist_der_mann: Your first crafted item. The beginning of everything.
advancement.fairplay.gruener_daumen.desc: A sapling – the beginning of your forest.
advancement.fairplay.mein_wald.title: My Forest
advancement.fairplay.mein_wald.descripti: Your sapling became a whole tree. It belongs to you.
advancement.fairplay.aussaat.title: Sowing
advancement.fairplay.aussaat.description: The soil is ready. Your own food is growing.
advancement.fairplay.ernte.title: Harvest
advancement.fairplay.tropfstein_trick.de: Your dripstone collects what the earth provides.
advancement.fairplay.wasserwirtschaft.de: Your own water source – fresh and rightfully yours.
advancement.fairplay.unendlich.title: Infinite
advancement.fairplay.heisse_lava.title: Hot Lava
advancement.fairplay.heisse_lava.descrip: Lava – the liquid gold of the underworld.
advancement.fairplay.keine_gewalt.title: No Violence
advancement.fairplay.keine_gewalt.descri: Direct attacks are forbidden. Be creative.
advancement.fairplay.einfallsreichtum.de: Sometimes the long way around is the better path.
advancement.fairplay.des_menschen_bester: A loyal companion for all time.
advancement.fairplay.bodyguard.title: Bodyguard
advancement.fairplay.bodyguard.descripti: Your dog handles what you are not allowed to do yourself.
advancement.fairplay.eigene_flotte.title: Own Fleet
advancement.fairplay.eigene_flotte.descr: By water or on rails – you travel in style.
advancement.fairplay.gute_nacht.title: Good Night
advancement.fairplay.gute_nacht.descript: Sleeping is easy. Bringing your own bed is not.
advancement.fairplay.bett_to_go.title: Bed To Go
advancement.fairplay.bett_to_go.descript: Now you sleep safely wherever you are.
advancement.fairplay.fairer_handel.title: Fair Trade
advancement.fairplay.fairer_handel.descr: Barter and trade – the honest path to progress.
advancement.fairplay.zuendung.title: Ignition
advancement.fairplay.zuendung.descriptio: Let a Creeper explode to clear blocks.
